name: Espresso Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Combine all ingredients in a large mixing bowl.
3. Pour mixture into bread machine according to manufacturer's instructions.
4. Set the baking time and temperature as directed by your bread machine settings.
5. Allow the loaf to cool on a wire rack before slicing.
